records.raw_ingredients_raw: Important information Safety Information Do not use if safety seal is broken or missing. Keep out of reach of children. Keep your licensed health care practitioner informed when using this product. Use this product as a food supplement only. Do not use for weight reduction. Indications A daily multivitamin & mineral supplement. Ingredients Rice Protein, Rice Bran, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Carbonate Proteinate, Calcium Phosphate Proteinate, Lemon Bioflavonoid Complex, Magnesium Carbonate Proteinate, Potassium Citrate Proteinate, Soy Lecithin, D-alpha Tocopheryl Succinate, Potassium Alginate, Choline Bitartrate, D-Calcium Pantothenate, Niacinamide, Inositol, Zinc Oxide Proteinate, Beta Carotene, Pyridoxine Hci, Thiamine Hci, Riboflavin, Para Amino Benzoic Acid, Rutin, Cyanocobalamin, Hesperidin Complex, Vitamin A Palmitate, Manganese Directions Use only as directed. For best results, shake or blend one heaping tablespoon (15g) of powder with 8 oz. (250mL) of water, juice or your favorite beverage. Keep in a cool, dry place. Legal Disclaimer These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
